---
title: "AI-Guided Climate Risk Adaptation"
author: "Alfa Pradana"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Daftar Isi"
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    highlight-style: github
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    df-print: paged
    self-contained: true
jupyter: python3
---


# Gambaran Umum {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Tentang modul ini

Modul pelatihan di dalam analisis ini seluruhnya menggunakan **Python** di dalam Quarto,
dengan pendekatan **prompt-driven** — di mana GenAI/LLM digunakan sebagai mitra pemrograman.
:::

**Dataset:** TerraClim — data iklim spatio-temporal untuk wilayah Indonesia, dengan variabel
seperti suhu, curah hujan, kelembaban, dan lainnya

<https://climate.northwestknowledge.net/TERRACLIMATE/index_directDownloads.php>

**Satuan waktu:** Bulanan (monthly)

**Asumsi kunci:** Tren iklim dapat mempengaruhi risiko banjir secara signifikan, terutama
melalui variabel suhu dan curah hujan

## Tujuan pembelajaran {.unnumbered}

Setelah menyelesaikan modul ini, peserta mampu:

1. Mengeksplorasi pola insidensi dari data TerraClim

## Alur kerja pelatihan {.unnumbered}

# Setup Lingkungan Kerja {#sec-setup}

```
Persona:
Kamu adalah analis risiko iklim senior di bank komersial Indonesia.

Context:
Saya memiliki dataset iklim Indonesia dari TerraClimate.
Dataset berisi kolom: maksimum temperature, minimum temperature, curah hujan, dan lainnya.

Task:
- Tulis sebuah cell setup yang siap digunakan di Colab: termasuk import library,
  konfigurasi plotting dasar, dan helper untuk reproducibility.
- Jika ada package yang belum terinstall, tunjukkan cara menjalankan instalasi di cell setup.

Constraints:
- Install dan load library ini sebagai dasar: numpy, pandas, geopandas, xarray, rioxarray,
  rasterio, matplotlib, seaborn, scikit-learn, pmdarima, statsmodels.

Verification:
- Print library versions and a simple "ready" message.
```

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| warning: false
#| code-summary: "Setup: imports & konfigurasi"

# =========================
# INSTALL REQUIRED PACKAGES
# (jalankan sekali di terminal / Colab)
# =========================
# !pip install numpy pandas geopandas xarray rioxarray rasterio \
#             matplotlib seaborn scikit-learn pmdarima statsmodels netCDF4

# =========================
# IMPORT LIBRARIES
# =========================

import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

import numpy  as np
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd

import xarray as xr
import rioxarray                           # noqa: F401  — aktivasi accessor .rio

import matplotlib.pyplot    as plt
import matplotlib.colors    as mcolors
import matplotlib.patches   as mpatches
import matplotlib.ticker    as mticker
import seaborn as sns

from sklearn.cluster        import KMeans
from sklearn.preprocessing  import StandardScaler

import pmdarima as pm                      # auto_arima (≈ R auto.arima)
from statsmodels.graphics.tsaplots import plot_acf, plot_pacf
from statsmodels.stats.diagnostic  import acorr_ljungbox

import glob, os, importlib

# =========================
# GLOBAL OPTIONS
# =========================

np.random.seed(123)
plt.rcParams.update({
    "figure.dpi"      : 120,
    "figure.facecolor": "white",
    "axes.spines.top" : False,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "font.size"       : 11,
})
sns.set_palette("tab10")

# =========================
# VERSION CHECK
# =========================

pkgs = {
    "numpy"      : np,
    "pandas"     : pd,
    "geopandas"  : gpd,
    "xarray"     : xr,
    "matplotlib" : plt,
    "seaborn"    : sns,
    "sklearn"    : importlib.import_module("sklearn"),
    "pmdarima"   : pm,
    "statsmodels": importlib.import_module("statsmodels"),
}

print("Package versions:")
for name, mod in pkgs.items():
    ver = getattr(mod, "__version__", "?")
    print(f"  {name:<12}: {ver}")

print("\n✅ Environment is ready for TerraClimate analysis")
```

# Eksplorasi Data TerraClimate {#sec-explore}

```
Persona:
Kamu adalah analis risiko iklim senior di bank komersial Indonesia dan pengajar Python

Task:
- Load batas wilayah Indonesia menggunakan shapefile lokal (provinsi / ADM1)
- Buat ADM0 (batas negara) dari union ADM1
- Plot geometri wilayah administrasi dengan border berwarna gray untuk ADM1
  dan bold untuk ADM0
```

```{python}
#| label: load-shp
#| code-summary: "Load shapefile batas administrasi"

# =========================
# LOAD SHAPEFILE (lokal)
# =========================

ADM1_SHP = "data/batas_provinsi/Provinsi_Kemdagri.shp"

indo_adm1 = gpd.read_file(ADM1_SHP).to_crs(epsg=4326)
indo_adm0 = indo_adm1.dissolve().reset_index(drop=True)   # union → ADM0

print(f"ADM1: {len(indo_adm1)} provinsi")
print(indo_adm1[["geometry"]].head(3))

# =========================
# PLOT BATAS ADMINISTRASI
# =========================

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))

indo_adm1.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="gray",   linewidth=0.4)
indo_adm0.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black",  linewidth=1.2)

ax.set_title("Batas Administrasi Indonesia", fontweight="bold", fontsize=13)
ax.set_xlabel("Longitude"); ax.set_ylabel("Latitude")
ax.axis("equal")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```


## Data suhu

```
Task:
- Baca data suhu maksimum dan minimum dari file NetCDF TerraClimate untuk
  periode yang tersedia (per tahun)
- Hitung suhu rata-rata bulanan: (tmax + tmin) / 2, konversi skala 0.1 °C
- Hitung suhu rata-rata tahunan
- Plot suhu rata-rata tahunan
```

```{python}
#| label: suhu
#| code-summary: "Load & proses data suhu"

# =========================
# 1. BACA FILE NETCDF SUHU
# =========================

tmax_files = sorted(glob.glob("data/TerraClimate_tmax_*.nc"))
tmin_files = sorted(glob.glob("data/TerraClimate_tmin_*.nc"))

print(f"tmax files: {[os.path.basename(f) for f in tmax_files]}")

# Buka sebagai multi-file dataset
ds_tmax = xr.open_mfdataset(tmax_files, combine="by_coords")
ds_tmin = xr.open_mfdataset(tmin_files, combine="by_coords")

tmax = ds_tmax["tmax"].squeeze(drop=True)   # (time, lat, lon)
tmin = ds_tmin["tmin"].squeeze(drop=True)

# =========================
# 2. SUHU RATA-RATA BULANAN
# =========================

# TerraClimate skala 0.1 °C → bagi 10
tavg_monthly = (tmax + tmin) / 2 / 10
tavg_monthly.name = "tavg"

# =========================
# 3. CLIP KE WILAYAH INDONESIA
# =========================

tavg_monthly = (
    tavg_monthly
    .rio.set_spatial_dims(x_dim="lon", y_dim="lat")
    .rio.write_crs("EPSG:4326")
    .rio.clip(indo_adm0.geometry, indo_adm0.crs, drop=True, all_touched=True)
)

# =========================
# 4. AGREGASI TAHUNAN
# =========================

tavg_annual = tavg_monthly.resample(time="YE").mean()   # mean per tahun

# Rata-rata spasial per tahun
temp_annual = (
    tavg_annual
    .mean(dim=["lat", "lon"])
    .to_pandas()
    .rename("temp_mean")
)
temp_annual.index = temp_annual.index.year
temp_annual = temp_annual.reset_index().rename(columns={"time": "year"})

# =========================
# 5. PLOT TREN TAHUNAN
# =========================

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 4))
ax.plot(temp_annual["year"], temp_annual["temp_mean"],
        marker="o", color="#e74c3c", linewidth=2)
ax.set_title("Rata-rata Suhu Tahunan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Tahun"); ax.set_ylabel("Suhu (°C)")
ax.xaxis.set_major_locator(mticker.MaxNLocator(integer=True))
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

print(temp_annual.to_string(index=False))
print("\n✅ Annual temperature successfully computed")
```

```{python}
#| label: suhu-map
#| code-summary: "Peta rata-rata suhu keseluruhan"

# Rata-rata seluruh periode
annual_mean_temp = tavg_annual.mean(dim="time")

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
annual_mean_temp.plot(ax=ax, cmap="RdYlBu_r",
                      cbar_kwargs={"label": "Suhu (°C)"})
indo_adm1.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.3)
indo_adm0.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.9)
ax.set_title("Rata-rata Suhu Tahunan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Longitude"); ax.set_ylabel("Latitude")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```


## Data curah hujan

```
Task:
Lakukan hal yang sama untuk data curah hujan
```

```{python}
#| label: curah-hujan
#| code-summary: "Load & proses data curah hujan"

# =========================
# 1. BACA FILE NETCDF CURAH HUJAN
# =========================

ppt_files = sorted(glob.glob("data/TerraClimate_ppt_*.nc"))
print(f"ppt files: {[os.path.basename(f) for f in ppt_files]}")

ds_ppt  = xr.open_mfdataset(ppt_files, combine="by_coords")
ppt_raw = ds_ppt["ppt"].squeeze(drop=True)   # unit: mm/bulan

# =========================
# 2. CLIP KE INDONESIA
# =========================

ppt_monthly = (
    ppt_raw
    .rio.set_spatial_dims(x_dim="lon", y_dim="lat")
    .rio.write_crs("EPSG:4326")
    .rio.clip(indo_adm0.geometry, indo_adm0.crs, drop=True, all_touched=True)
)
ppt_monthly.name = "ppt"

# =========================
# 3. TOTAL TAHUNAN (sum, bukan mean)
# =========================

ppt_annual = ppt_monthly.resample(time="YE").sum()

# Rata-rata spasial nasional per tahun
ppt_annual_mean = (
    ppt_annual
    .mean(dim=["lat", "lon"])
    .to_pandas()
    .rename("precip_mm")
)
ppt_annual_mean.index = ppt_annual_mean.index.year
ppt_annual_df = ppt_annual_mean.reset_index().rename(columns={"time": "year"})

# =========================
# 4. PLOT TREN TAHUNAN
# =========================

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 4))
ax.plot(ppt_annual_df["year"], ppt_annual_df["precip_mm"],
        marker="o", color="#2980b9", linewidth=2)
ax.set_title("Total Curah Hujan Tahunan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Tahun"); ax.set_ylabel("Curah Hujan (mm/tahun)")
ax.xaxis.set_major_locator(mticker.MaxNLocator(integer=True))
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

print(ppt_annual_df.to_string(index=False))
print("\n✅ Annual precipitation series ready")
```

```{python}
#| label: hujan-map
#| code-summary: "Peta rata-rata curah hujan keseluruhan"

annual_mean_ppt = ppt_annual.mean(dim="time")

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
annual_mean_ppt.plot(ax=ax, cmap="Blues",
                     cbar_kwargs={"label": "Curah Hujan (mm)"})
indo_adm1.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.3)
indo_adm0.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.9)
ax.set_title("Rata-rata Curah Hujan Tahunan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Longitude"); ax.set_ylabel("Latitude")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```


## Stacking peta suhu dan curah hujan

```
Task:
- Gabungkan (stack) array suhu dan curah hujan rata-rata ke dalam satu DataFrame
  dengan kolom koordinat (x, y) dan nilai kedua variabel (suhu, curah_hujan)
- Siapkan untuk visualisasi bivariat
```

```{python}
#| label: stack-raster
#| code-summary: "Stack raster → DataFrame"

# =========================
# 1. KONVERSI KE DATAFRAME 2D
# =========================

df_suhu = (
    annual_mean_temp
    .to_dataframe(name="suhu")
    .reset_index()
    .dropna(subset=["suhu"])
    .rename(columns={"lon": "x", "lat": "y"})
)

df_hujan = (
    annual_mean_ppt
    .to_dataframe(name="curah_hujan")
    .reset_index()
    .dropna(subset=["curah_hujan"])
    .rename(columns={"lon": "x", "lat": "y"})
)

# =========================
# 2. GABUNGKAN (MERGE BY KOORDINAT)
# =========================

climate_df = (
    df_suhu[["x", "y", "suhu"]]
    .merge(df_hujan[["x", "y", "curah_hujan"]], on=["x", "y"])
    .dropna()
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

print(climate_df.head())
print(f"\nShape: {climate_df.shape}")
print(climate_df.describe().round(2))
print("\n✅ Raster stack ready for bivariate visualization")
```


# Peta Bivariat Suhu & Curah Hujan

## Analisis bivariat

```
Task:
- Klasifikasi data suhu dan curah hujan ke dalam kelas bivariat (quantile 4×4 = 16 kelas)
- Plot distribusi frekuensi tiap kelas bivariat
```

```{python}
#| label: bivariate
#| code-summary: "Klasifikasi bivariat quantile 4×4"

# =========================
# 1. FUNGSI BI_CLASS (≈ biscale::bi_class)
# =========================

def bi_class(df, x_col, y_col, dim=4, style="quantile"):
    """Buat label kelas bivariat dari dua variabel numerik."""
    df = df.copy()
    if style == "quantile":
        df["x_class"] = pd.qcut(df[x_col], dim, labels=False, duplicates="drop") + 1
        df["y_class"] = pd.qcut(df[y_col], dim, labels=False, duplicates="drop") + 1
    elif style == "equal":
        df["x_class"] = pd.cut(df[x_col], dim, labels=False) + 1
        df["y_class"] = pd.cut(df[y_col], dim, labels=False) + 1
    df["bi_class"] = (
        df["x_class"].astype(int).astype(str) + "-" +
        df["y_class"].astype(int).astype(str)
    )
    return df

climate_bi = bi_class(climate_df, x_col="suhu", y_col="curah_hujan", dim=4)

# =========================
# 2. PLOT DISTRIBUSI KELAS
# =========================

class_counts = climate_bi["bi_class"].value_counts().sort_index()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
ax.bar(class_counts.index, class_counts.values, color="#3498db", alpha=0.8)
ax.set_title("Distribusi Kelas Bivariat (Suhu × Curah Hujan)", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Kelas Bivariat (Quantile 4×4)")
ax.set_ylabel("Jumlah Observasi")
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right", fontsize=8)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

print(climate_bi.head())
```


## Memetakan data

```
Task:
- Buat peta bivariat dengan skema warna BlueOr (4×4 = 16 warna)
- Overlay batas administrasi ADM1 dan ADM0
- Buat legenda bivariat 4×4
- Tampilkan peta dan legenda dalam satu figure
```

```{python}
#| label: mapping
#| code-summary: "Peta bivariat Indonesia"

# =========================
# 1. DEFINISI PALET BlueOr (16 warna untuk 4×4)
# =========================

# Interpolasi dua gradien: biru (y tinggi) dan oranye (x tinggi)
# Kelas: x = suhu (1–4), y = curah hujan (1–4)
# warna [y-1][x-1]

def make_bivar_palette(dim=4):
    """
    Buat palette bivariat dim×dim dengan interpolasi Biru–Oranye.
    Baris = y-class (curah hujan, bawah=rendah), Kolom = x-class (suhu, kiri=rendah)
    """
    blue   = np.array(mcolors.to_rgb("#1F78B4"))   # Biru (suhu rendah, hujan tinggi)
    orange = np.array(mcolors.to_rgb("#FF7F00"))   # Oranye (suhu tinggi, hujan rendah)
    white  = np.array([1.0, 1.0, 1.0])
    brown  = np.array(mcolors.to_rgb("#8B4513"))   # Coklat (suhu tinggi, hujan tinggi)

    palette = {}
    for xi in range(1, dim + 1):            # suhu
        for yi in range(1, dim + 1):        # curah hujan
            tx = (xi - 1) / (dim - 1)      # 0..1
            ty = (yi - 1) / (dim - 1)      # 0..1
            # Interpolasi bilinear
            color = (
                (1 - tx) * (1 - ty) * white +
                tx       * (1 - ty) * orange +
                (1 - tx) * ty       * blue +
                tx       * ty       * brown
            )
            palette[f"{xi}-{yi}"] = mcolors.to_hex(np.clip(color, 0, 1))
    return palette

bivar_palette = make_bivar_palette(dim=4)

# =========================
# 2. ASSIGN WARNA KE SETIAP PIKSEL
# =========================

climate_bi["color"] = climate_bi["bi_class"].map(bivar_palette).fillna("#cccccc")

# =========================
# 3. PETA BIVARIAT
# =========================

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(14, 6))

# Axes utama (peta)
ax_map = fig.add_axes([0.0, 0.0, 0.80, 1.0])
ax_map.scatter(
    climate_bi["x"], climate_bi["y"],
    c=climate_bi["color"], s=0.3, linewidths=0
)
indo_adm1.plot(ax=ax_map, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.25)
indo_adm0.plot(ax=ax_map, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.70)

ax_map.set_title("Indonesia: Pola Suhu dan Curah Hujan",
                 fontweight="bold", fontsize=14, pad=10)
ax_map.set_xlabel(""); ax_map.set_ylabel("")
ax_map.tick_params(left=False, bottom=False,
                   labelleft=False, labelbottom=False)
ax_map.text(0.5, -0.02,
            "Rataan suhu dan curah hujan | Sumber: TerraClimate | Author: Alfa Pradana",
            ha="center", fontsize=9, color="gray",
            transform=ax_map.transAxes)

# Axes legenda (sudut kiri bawah)
dim = 4
ax_leg = fig.add_axes([0.01, 0.04, 0.16, 0.30])
for xi in range(1, dim + 1):
    for yi in range(1, dim + 1):
        col = bivar_palette.get(f"{xi}-{yi}", "#ccc")
        ax_leg.add_patch(mpatches.Rectangle(
            (xi - 1, yi - 1), 1, 1,
            facecolor=col, edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.5
        ))

ax_leg.set_xlim(0, dim); ax_leg.set_ylim(0, dim)
ax_leg.set_xlabel("Suhu →", fontsize=8, labelpad=2)
ax_leg.set_ylabel("Curah Hujan →", fontsize=8, labelpad=2)
ax_leg.tick_params(left=False, bottom=False,
                   labelleft=False, labelbottom=False)
ax_leg.set_title("Legenda", fontsize=8, pad=4)

plt.savefig("bivariate_map.png", dpi=200, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
print("\n✅ Peta bivariat berhasil dibuat")
```


# Klasterisasi Zona Iklim (K-Means) {#sec-kmeans}

```
Task:
- Standardisasi variabel suhu dan curah_hujan sebelum clustering
- Tentukan jumlah cluster optimal menggunakan Elbow Method (k = 2–10)
- Fit K-Means dengan k optimal (n_init=25, random_state=123)
- Ringkasan karakteristik tiap cluster
- Peta spasial zona iklim + overlay batas administrasi
```

## Menentukan Jumlah Cluster Optimal

```{python}
#| label: kmeans-elbow
#| code-summary: "K-Means: Elbow Method"

# =========================
# 1. STANDARDISASI FITUR
# =========================

scaler = StandardScaler()
features = climate_df[["suhu", "curah_hujan"]].values
features_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(features)

# =========================
# 2. ELBOW METHOD (k = 2–10)
# =========================

inertias = []
k_range  = range(2, 11)

for k in k_range:
    km = KMeans(n_clusters=k, n_init=25, random_state=123)
    km.fit(features_scaled)
    inertias.append(km.inertia_)

elbow_df = pd.DataFrame({"k": list(k_range), "wss": inertias})

# =========================
# 3. PLOT ELBOW
# =========================

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
ax.plot(elbow_df["k"], elbow_df["wss"], marker="o", color="#2c3e50", linewidth=2)
ax.set_title("Elbow Method — Menentukan Jumlah Cluster Optimal",
             fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Jumlah Cluster (k)")
ax.set_ylabel("Total Within-Cluster Sum of Squares (Inertia)")
ax.set_xticks(list(k_range))
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

## Fitting K-Means & Pemetaan Zona Iklim

```{python}
#| label: kmeans-fit
#| code-summary: "K-Means: Fit & Visualisasi"

# =========================
# 4. FIT K-MEANS (k = 5)
# =========================

K_OPTIMAL = 5

km_fit = KMeans(n_clusters=K_OPTIMAL, n_init=25, random_state=123)
km_fit.fit(features_scaled)

climate_df["cluster"] = km_fit.labels_ + 1          # label 1-based
climate_df["cluster"] = climate_df["cluster"].astype(str)

# =========================
# 5. RINGKASAN TIAP CLUSTER
# =========================

cluster_summary = (
    climate_df
    .groupby("cluster")
    .agg(
        n_piksel     =("suhu",        "count"),
        suhu_mean    =("suhu",        "mean"),
        hujan_mean   =("curah_hujan", "mean"),
    )
    .round(2)
    .sort_values("suhu_mean")
    .reset_index()
)
print("=== Ringkasan Cluster ===")
print(cluster_summary.to_string(index=False))

# =========================
# 6. PETA ZONA IKLIM
# =========================

SET2_COLORS = ["#66C2A5", "#FC8D62", "#8DA0CB", "#E78AC3", "#A6D854",
               "#FFD92F", "#E5C494", "#B3B3B3", "#1B9E77", "#D95F02"]

cluster_pal = {str(i+1): SET2_COLORS[i] for i in range(K_OPTIMAL)}
climate_df["clr"] = climate_df["cluster"].map(cluster_pal)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 5))
ax.scatter(climate_df["x"], climate_df["y"],
           c=climate_df["clr"], s=0.4, linewidths=0)

indo_adm1.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.25)
indo_adm0.plot(ax=ax, facecolor="none", edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.70)

# Legend
legend_handles = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=cluster_pal[k], label=f"Cluster {k}")
    for k in sorted(cluster_pal.keys())
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_handles, title="Zona Iklim",
          loc="lower right", fontsize=9, title_fontsize=10)

ax.set_title(f"Zona Iklim Indonesia — K-Means (k={K_OPTIMAL})",
             fontweight="bold", fontsize=13)
ax.set_xlabel(""); ax.set_ylabel("")
ax.tick_params(left=False, bottom=False, labelleft=False, labelbottom=False)
ax.text(0.5, -0.03,
        "Berdasarkan rata-rata suhu dan curah hujan | Sumber: TerraClimate",
        ha="center", fontsize=9, color="gray", transform=ax.transAxes)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

## Profil Zona Iklim

```{python}
#| label: kmeans-profile
#| code-summary: "K-Means: Scatter plot profil cluster"

# Sampel 5.000 piksel agar plot cepat
sample_df = climate_df.sample(n=5000, random_state=123)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 5))

for cluster_id, grp in sample_df.groupby("cluster"):
    ax.scatter(
        grp["suhu"], grp["curah_hujan"],
        c=cluster_pal[cluster_id], label=f"Cluster {cluster_id}",
        alpha=0.45, s=10, linewidths=0
    )

ax.set_title("Profil Cluster: Suhu vs Curah Hujan", fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Suhu Rata-rata (°C)")
ax.set_ylabel("Curah Hujan Rata-rata (mm/tahun)")
ax.legend(title="Cluster", fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```


# Forecasting Iklim (ARIMA) {#sec-arima}

```
Task:
- Ekstrak rata-rata spasial per bulan dari raster suhu dan curah hujan
- Fit model auto_arima (SARIMA seasonal, m=12)
- Forecast 36 bulan ke depan (2026–2028)
- Plot hasil forecast dengan interval kepercayaan 80% dan 95%
- Tampilkan diagnostik residual dan RMSE in-sample
```

## Ekstraksi Time Series Bulanan

```{python}
#| label: arima-ts
#| code-summary: "ARIMA: Ekstraksi time series bulanan"

# =========================
# 1. SPATIAL MEAN PER BULAN
# =========================

temp_mean_monthly = (
    tavg_monthly
    .mean(dim=["lat", "lon"])
    .to_pandas()
    .rename("temp_mean")
)

ppt_mean_monthly = (
    ppt_monthly
    .mean(dim=["lat", "lon"])
    .to_pandas()
    .rename("precip_mm")
)

# Gabungkan ke satu DataFrame
ts_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "suhu"       : temp_mean_monthly.values,
    "curah_hujan": ppt_mean_monthly.values,
}, index=temp_mean_monthly.index)

ts_df.index = pd.to_datetime(ts_df.index)
print(ts_df.head())
print(f"\nPeriode: {ts_df.index[0].strftime('%Y-%m')} s/d {ts_df.index[-1].strftime('%Y-%m')}")

# =========================
# 2. PLOT DATA MENTAH
# =========================

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(11, 6), sharex=True)

ax1.plot(ts_df.index, ts_df["suhu"], color="#e74c3c", linewidth=1.5)
ax1.set_ylabel("Suhu (°C)")
ax1.set_title("Suhu Rata-rata Bulanan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")

ax2.plot(ts_df.index, ts_df["curah_hujan"], color="#2980b9", linewidth=1.5)
ax2.set_ylabel("Curah Hujan (mm)")
ax2.set_title("Curah Hujan Rata-rata Bulanan Indonesia", fontweight="bold")

plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

## Model ARIMA — Suhu

```{python}
#| label: arima-temp
#| code-summary: "ARIMA: Model suhu"

# =========================
# 3. AUTO ARIMA — SUHU (≈ R auto.arima)
# =========================

temp_series = ts_df["suhu"].values

temp_arima = pm.auto_arima(
    temp_series,
    seasonal    = True,
    m           = 12,            # musiman bulanan
    stepwise    = False,
    n_jobs      = -1,
    information_criterion = "aic",
    error_action = "ignore",
    suppress_warnings = True,
)

print("=== Model ARIMA Suhu ===")
print(temp_arima.summary())

# Akurasi in-sample
temp_fitted  = temp_arima.predict_in_sample()
temp_resid   = temp_series - temp_fitted
temp_rmse    = np.sqrt(np.mean(temp_resid**2))
temp_mae     = np.mean(np.abs(temp_resid))
print(f"\nRMSE in-sample : {temp_rmse:.4f} °C")
print(f"MAE  in-sample : {temp_mae:.4f} °C")

# =========================
# 4. FORECAST 36 BULAN (2026–2028)
# =========================

H = 36
temp_fc, temp_ci = temp_arima.predict(n_periods=H, return_conf_int=True, alpha=0.05)
temp_fc_80, _    = temp_arima.predict(n_periods=H, return_conf_int=True, alpha=0.20)

last_date    = ts_df.index[-1]
fc_index     = pd.date_range(
    start  = last_date + pd.DateOffset(months=1),
    periods= H, freq="MS"
)

# =========================
# 5. PLOT FORECAST
# =========================

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 5))

# Data historis
ax.plot(ts_df.index, temp_series, color="#e74c3c", linewidth=1.5,
        label="Historis")
# Forecast
ax.plot(fc_index, temp_fc, color="#c0392b", linewidth=2, linestyle="--",
        label="Forecast")
# Interval 95%
ax.fill_between(fc_index, temp_ci[:, 0], temp_ci[:, 1],
                alpha=0.20, color="#e74c3c", label="CI 95%")
# Interval 80%
ax.fill_between(fc_index, temp_fc_80[1][:, 0], temp_fc_80[1][:, 1],
                alpha=0.35, color="#e74c3c", label="CI 80%")

ax.axvline(last_date, color="gray", linestyle=":", linewidth=1)
ax.set_title(f"Forecast Suhu Indonesia — {temp_arima.order}/{temp_arima.seasonal_order}",
             fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Tahun"); ax.set_ylabel("Suhu (°C)")
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

## Model ARIMA — Curah Hujan

```{python}
#| label: arima-ppt
#| code-summary: "ARIMA: Model curah hujan"

# =========================
# 6. AUTO ARIMA — CURAH HUJAN
# =========================

ppt_series = ts_df["curah_hujan"].values

ppt_arima = pm.auto_arima(
    ppt_series,
    seasonal    = True,
    m           = 12,
    stepwise    = False,
    n_jobs      = -1,
    information_criterion = "aic",
    error_action = "ignore",
    suppress_warnings = True,
)

print("=== Model ARIMA Curah Hujan ===")
print(ppt_arima.summary())

ppt_fitted  = ppt_arima.predict_in_sample()
ppt_resid   = ppt_series - ppt_fitted
ppt_rmse    = np.sqrt(np.mean(ppt_resid**2))
ppt_mae     = np.mean(np.abs(ppt_resid))
print(f"\nRMSE in-sample : {ppt_rmse:.4f} mm")
print(f"MAE  in-sample : {ppt_mae:.4f} mm")

# =========================
# 7. FORECAST
# =========================

ppt_fc, ppt_ci    = ppt_arima.predict(n_periods=H, return_conf_int=True, alpha=0.05)
ppt_fc_80, _      = ppt_arima.predict(n_periods=H, return_conf_int=True, alpha=0.20)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 5))

ax.plot(ts_df.index, ppt_series, color="#2980b9", linewidth=1.5,
        label="Historis")
ax.plot(fc_index, ppt_fc, color="#1a5276", linewidth=2, linestyle="--",
        label="Forecast")
ax.fill_between(fc_index, ppt_ci[:, 0], ppt_ci[:, 1],
                alpha=0.20, color="#2980b9", label="CI 95%")
ax.fill_between(fc_index, ppt_fc_80[1][:, 0], ppt_fc_80[1][:, 1],
                alpha=0.35, color="#2980b9", label="CI 80%")

ax.axvline(last_date, color="gray", linestyle=":", linewidth=1)
ax.set_title(f"Forecast Curah Hujan Indonesia — {ppt_arima.order}/{ppt_arima.seasonal_order}",
             fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xlabel("Tahun"); ax.set_ylabel("Curah Hujan (mm)")
ax.legend(fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

## Diagnostik Residual

```{python}
#| label: arima-diagnostics
#| code-summary: "ARIMA: Diagnostik residual"

# =========================
# 8. DIAGNOSTIK RESIDUAL — SUHU
# =========================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(11, 6))
fig.suptitle("Diagnostik Residual — Model ARIMA Suhu", fontweight="bold")

# Residual time series
axes[0, 0].plot(ts_df.index, temp_resid, color="#e74c3c", linewidth=1)
axes[0, 0].axhline(0, color="black", linewidth=0.8, linestyle="--")
axes[0, 0].set_title("Residual")
axes[0, 0].set_ylabel("Residual (°C)")

# Histogram residual
axes[0, 1].hist(temp_resid, bins=20, color="#e74c3c", alpha=0.75,
                edgecolor="white")
axes[0, 1].set_title("Distribusi Residual")
axes[0, 1].set_xlabel("Residual")

# ACF
plot_acf(temp_resid, ax=axes[1, 0], lags=24, color="#e74c3c")
axes[1, 0].set_title("ACF Residual")

# PACF
plot_pacf(temp_resid, ax=axes[1, 1], lags=24, color="#e74c3c", method="ywm")
axes[1, 1].set_title("PACF Residual")

plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

# Uji Ljung-Box
lb_test = acorr_ljungbox(temp_resid, lags=[12], return_df=True)
print("Uji Ljung-Box (lag 12):")
print(lb_test)
```

## Ringkasan Forecast

```{python}
#| label: arima-summary
#| code-summary: "ARIMA: Tabel ringkasan forecast"

# =========================
# 9. TABEL RINGKASAN FORECAST
# =========================

temp_fc_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "bulan"      : fc_index.strftime("%Y-%m"),
    "prediksi"   : temp_fc.round(3),
    "lower_80"   : temp_fc_80[1][:, 0].round(3),
    "upper_80"   : temp_fc_80[1][:, 1].round(3),
    "lower_95"   : temp_ci[:, 0].round(3),
    "upper_95"   : temp_ci[:, 1].round(3),
    "variabel"   : "Suhu (°C)"
})

ppt_fc_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "bulan"      : fc_index.strftime("%Y-%m"),
    "prediksi"   : ppt_fc.round(2),
    "lower_80"   : ppt_fc_80[1][:, 0].round(2),
    "upper_80"   : ppt_fc_80[1][:, 1].round(2),
    "lower_95"   : ppt_ci[:, 0].round(2),
    "upper_95"   : ppt_ci[:, 1].round(2),
    "variabel"   : "Curah Hujan (mm)"
})

print("=== Forecast Suhu: 6 bulan pertama ===")
print(temp_fc_df.head(6).to_string(index=False))

print("\n=== Forecast Curah Hujan: 6 bulan pertama ===")
print(ppt_fc_df.head(6).to_string(index=False))

# Ringkasan akurasi
accuracy_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "Variabel" : ["Suhu (°C)", "Curah Hujan (mm)"],
    "Model"    : [
        str(temp_arima.order) + "/" + str(temp_arima.seasonal_order),
        str(ppt_arima.order)  + "/" + str(ppt_arima.seasonal_order),
    ],
    "AIC"  : [round(temp_arima.aic(), 2), round(ppt_arima.aic(), 2)],
    "RMSE" : [round(temp_rmse, 4),        round(ppt_rmse, 4)],
    "MAE"  : [round(temp_mae, 4),         round(ppt_mae, 4)],
})

print("\n=== Ringkasan Akurasi Model ===")
print(accuracy_df.to_string(index=False))

print("\n✅ Model ARIMA selesai — forecast siap digunakan")
```


# Climate Risk x Data Kredit

```
Task:
- Overlay dengan data kredit per wilayah
```

```{python}
#| label: generate-dummy-loan
#| eval: false
#| code-summary: "Generate dummy loan data"

# =========================
# 1. GENERATE DUMMY LOAN DATA
# =========================

np.random.seed(123)
n = 5000

loan_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "loan_id"    : [f"LN{i:05d}" for i in range(1, n + 1)],
    "longitude"  : np.random.uniform(95, 141, n),
    "latitude"   : np.random.uniform(-11, 6, n),
    "outstanding": np.round(np.random.lognormal(mean=16, sigma=1, size=n)).astype(int),
    "sektor"     : np.random.choice(
        ["Agriculture", "Manufacturing", "Trade", "Services"],
        size=n, p=[0.3, 0.2, 0.3, 0.2]
    ),
    "tenor_bulan": np.random.choice([12, 24, 36, 60], size=n),
    "pd"         : np.round(np.random.uniform(0.01, 0.15, n), 3),
})

print(loan_df.head())
print(loan_df["outstanding"].describe())
```

```{python}
#| label: climate-x-credit
#| eval: false
#| code-summary: "Overlay iklim × data kredit"

# =========================
# 2. KONVERSI KE GEODATAFRAME
# =========================

loan_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    loan_df,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(loan_df["longitude"], loan_df["latitude"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

# =========================
# 3. EXTRACT KELAS BIVARIAT KE TITIK KREDIT
# =========================

# Buat GeoDataFrame dari climate_bi dengan grid raster
climate_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    climate_bi,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(climate_bi["x"], climate_bi["y"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

# Nearest-neighbor join: titik kredit → kelas iklim terdekat
loan_climate = gpd.sjoin_nearest(
    loan_gdf, climate_gdf[["bi_class", "geometry"]],
    how="left", max_distance=0.5
)

loan_gdf["bi_class"] = loan_climate["bi_class"].values

# =========================
# 4. AGREGASI EXPOSURE PER KELAS IKLIM
# =========================

exposure_by_class = (
    loan_gdf.groupby("bi_class")
    .agg(
        total_outstanding=("outstanding", "sum"),
        n_debitur        =("loan_id",     "count"),
    )
    .reset_index()
    .sort_values("total_outstanding", ascending=False)
)

total_portfolio = exposure_by_class["total_outstanding"].sum()
exposure_by_class["pct_exposure"] = (
    exposure_by_class["total_outstanding"] / total_portfolio * 100
).round(2)

print(exposure_by_class)
print("\n✅ Climate risk exposure successfully computed")
```
